posts.title: IAM privilege escalation: patterns you'll actually see in the wild
posts.excerpt: AWS IAM privilege escalation isn't about zero-days. It's about abusing legitimate permissions in ways the account owner didn't intend. Here are the patterns that come up most often.

posts.title: Hi, I'm Karthik - Cloud Security Engineer
posts.excerpt: Cloud Security Engineer obsessed with AWS, IAM, and making sure the things we build don't end up in a breach report. This is my corner of the internet.
